## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss Surge AI's branding, messaging, and upcoming events](https://fathom.video/share/z6qvhMixHyVAhBANCc6XbUyMyysJxD41?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Brand messaging needs refinement: shift from present-focused to future-oriented, less competitive framing](https://fathom.video/share/z6qvhMixHyVAhBANCc6XbUyMyysJxD41?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
  - [Website update nearly complete, awaiting final content (esp. GPT-5 articles)](https://fathom.video/share/z6qvhMixHyVAhBANCc6XbUyMyysJxD41?tab=summary&timestamp=1284.0)
  - [Upcoming events: meetup (Aug 26) and Quince event; need to finalize attendee lists](https://fathom.video/share/z6qvhMixHyVAhBANCc6XbUyMyysJxD41?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Media training session scheduled for later today to improve executive communication](https://fathom.video/share/z6qvhMixHyVAhBANCc6XbUyMyysJxD41?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Topics

### Brand Messaging and Positioning

  - [Current talking points feel outdated, need to shift from "even today" to future-oriented messaging](https://fathom.video/share/z6qvhMixHyVAhBANCc6XbUyMyysJxD41?tab=summary&timestamp=1108.0)
  - [Less focus on competitive positioning (e.g., "quality beats scale"), more on positive vision](https://fathom.video/share/z6qvhMixHyVAhBANCc6XbUyMyysJxD41?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)
  - [Aim for 5 core positioning statements that are visionary and powerful](https://fathom.video/share/z6qvhMixHyVAhBANCc6XbUyMyysJxD41?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)
  - [Need to better illustrate Surge's unique approach through concrete examples](https://fathom.video/share/z6qvhMixHyVAhBANCc6XbUyMyysJxD41?tab=summary&timestamp=1825.0)
  - [Goal: Finalize brand messaging this week](https://fathom.video/share/z6qvhMixHyVAhBANCc6XbUyMyysJxD41?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)

### Website Updates

  - [New website ready to launch, pending GPT-5 article content](https://fathom.video/share/z6qvhMixHyVAhBANCc6XbUyMyysJxD41?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
  - [Blog features new dynamic components (prompts, graphs, Twitter feeds)](https://fathom.video/share/z6qvhMixHyVAhBANCc6XbUyMyysJxD41?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)
  - [Plan to distinguish between quick "notes" and in-depth "research" posts](https://fathom.video/share/z6qvhMixHyVAhBANCc6XbUyMyysJxD41?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
  - [Aiming for weekly publishing cadence](https://fathom.video/share/z6qvhMixHyVAhBANCc6XbUyMyysJxD41?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)

  - [Discussion on balancing hype vs. authenticity in media presence](https://fathom.video/share/z6qvhMixHyVAhBANCc6XbUyMyysJxD41?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)
